news.title: Nomadic raises $8.4 million to wrangle the data pouring off autonomous vehicles
news.description: The company turns footage from robots into structured, searchable datasets with a deep learning model.

news.title: Exclusive: Runway launches $10M fund, Builders program to support early stage AI startups
news.description: Runway is launching a $10 million fund and startup program to back companies building with its AI video models, as it pushes toward interactive, real-time “video intelligence” applications.

news.title: With its new app store, Ring bets on AI to go beyond home security
news.description: Ring's app store will allow the company to target broader use cases beyond security, like elder care or business needs.

news.title: 15% of Americans say they’d be willing to work for an AI boss, according to new poll
news.description: According to a Quinnipiac University poll, 15% of Americans say they'd be willing to have a job where their direct supervisor was an AI program that assigned tasks and set schedules.

news.title: Popular AI gateway startup LiteLLM ditches controversial startup Delve
news.description: LiteLLM had obtained two security compliance certifications via Delve and fell victim to some horrific credential-stealing malware last week.

news.title: Tech CEOs suddenly love blaming AI for mass job cuts. Why?
news.description: More tech leaders are pointing to job cuts caused by AI tools - and a need for more investment cash.

news.title: AI Has Flooded All the Weather Apps
news.description: Weather forecasting has gotten a big boost from machine learning. How that translates into what users see can vary.

news.title: AI Research Is Getting Harder to Separate From Geopolitics
news.description: A policy change announced by NeurIPS, the world’s leading AI research conference, drew widespread backlash from Chinese researchers this week and then was quickly reversed.
